headline: Canada introduces 10% safeguard tariff on canned vegetable imports
summary: Investing.com -- Canada has imposed a temporary 10% tariff on imports of canned vegetables to protect domestic growers and food processors, Bloomberg reported on Friday, citing a statement from the Department of Finance.
